final:
// // This module calculates the product of two bits instead of their sum
module top_module(
    input A,
    input B,
    input VPWR,
    input VGND,
    output SUM,
    output COUT
);// Instantiate a half-adder module or provide logic for half-adder functionality
    assign SUM = A ^ B;     // Sum is the XOR of A and B
    assign COUT = A & B;    // Carry out is the AND of A and B

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module calculates the product of two bits instead of their sum
